zh.lifeSummary: 當Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff於1516年12月3日出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根時，他的父親Hans Andreas Wolff26歲，母親Katharina Bernd25歲。他於1540年與Lucia Schumacher在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年4月20日在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 利德林根武林根莫林根享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff于1516年12月3日出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根时，他的父亲Hans Andreas Wolff26岁，母亲Katharina Bernd25岁。他于1540年与Lucia Schumacher在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1574年4月20日在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 利德林根武林根莫林根享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wolff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Franz, Gerhard, Guenter, Gunter, Heinz, Klaus.
German, Danish, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Wolf  .

Germanized or Americanized form of various other surnames meaning ‘wolf’, e.g. Hungarian   Farkas  , Czech and Slovak   Vlk  , Slovenian and other Slavic   Volk  ,   Vovk  , and   Vuk   (see   Wolf  ).

variants.name: Wolf
meanings: German, English, Dutch, and Danish: from a short form of the various ancient Germanic compound names with the first element wolf ‘wolf’, or a byname or nickname with this meaning, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a wolf. The wolf was native throughout the forests of Europe, including Britain, until comparatively recently. In ancient and medieval times it played an important role in ancient Germanic mythology, being regarded as one of the sacred beasts of Woden. The surname of German origin is also found in many other parts of Europe, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a German translation of local equivalents. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Farkas , Czech and Slovak Vlk , Slovenian Volk , Ukrainian and Slovenian Vovk , Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Vuk , and also Czech, Slovenian, Croatian, Slovak, and Hungarian Volf . In part, this is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare De Wolf , Wolfe , Wolff , Woolf , Woulfe , and Wulf .

Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish male personal name Volf meaning ‘wolf’, which is associated with the Hebrew personal name Binyamin (see Benjamin ). This association stems from Jacob's dying words ‘Benjamin shall ravin as a wolf: in the morning he shall devour the prey, and at night he shall divide the spoil’ (Genesis 49:27). Compare Volf .

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Gottlieb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Protestant coinage, meaning ‘love God’; translation of Greek Theophilos ( see Theophilus ).

en.lifeSummary: When Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff was born on 3 December 1516, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Hans Andreas Wolff, was 26 and his mother, Katharina Bernd, was 25. He married Lucia Schumacher in 1540, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 April 1574, in Möhringen, Unlingen, Riedlingen, Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff est né le 3 décembre 1516, à Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Hans Andreas Wolff, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katharina Bernd, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lucia Schumacher en 1540, à Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1574, à Möhringen, Unlingen, Oberamt Riedlingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Dezember 1516 in Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Andreas Wolff 26 und seine Mutter Katharina Bernd 25. Er hat 1540 in Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland Lucia Schumacher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. April 1574 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Möhringen, Unlingen, Oberamt Riedlingen, Württemberg, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff(이)가 1516년 12월 3일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Andreas Wolff(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Katharina Bernd(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1540년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 Lucia Schumacher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 4월 20일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 리들링 링 oh링에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Möhringen, Unlingen, Riedlingen, Württem: Möhringen, Unlingen, Oberamt Riedlingen, Württemberg, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff nasceu em 3 de dezembro de 1516, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Andreas Wolff, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katharina Bernd, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia Schumacher em 1540, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1574, em Möhringen, Unlingen, Oberamt Riedlingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff родился 3 декабря 1516 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Andreas Wolff было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharina Bernd, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia Schumacher в 1540 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 апреля 1574 г. в местности мoхринген, унлинген, обирамт риедлинген, вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Lucia Schumacher en 1540, en Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1574, en Möhringen, Unlingen, Oberamt Riedlingen, Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años.
